title: lathyrus maritimus subsp. pubescens
intro: Lathyrus maritimus subsp. pubescens, also known as the hairy sea pea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. The hairy sea pea is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus maritimus subsp. pubescens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
